text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world rapidly, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias: AI systems can learn unfair patterns from data, leading to discrimination against certain groups. This makes fairness essential—we must ensure AI treats everyone equally. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often uses personal information, sometimes without clear consent. Transparency is also crucial; people should understand how AI makes decisions that affect their lives. To address these challenges, responsible AI development requires careful planning, testing, and oversight. Companies and governments must work together to create clear rules and guidelines, so that AI benefits society without causing harm.
